dependsOn.guidance: Briefs that must be built before this one — usually the tables this model's relationships point at.

instructions.whoFillsThisIn: Developers (Product can sanity-check the information being stored).
instructions.when: Whenever a page needs to store data. One of these per model/table.
instructions.how: Answer in plain English where you can.
instructions.note: Solution = the folder this file sits in. Table / object name = this file's name.

whatThisModelIs.question: What does this model represent, in one line?
whatThisModelIs.answer: What one work item requires of one Solution it affects: the changes needed there, the tests that must prove them, the branch to work on and the branch it is cut from, any UI pictures — and the API and page schemas the AI generates from all of that.

fields.guidance: One entry per piece of data.

entries.rules: must reference a Solution of the work item's own Product; unique with workItemId
entries.description: The Solution this work item affects
What has to change in this Solution, in the team's own words
What must be proved — written before the thing that proves it
The branch this work lands on. Prefilled from the Develop Strategy's naming pattern
The branch it is cut from — obvious to whoever set it up, a guess to everyone else. Prefilled from the Develop Strategy

entries.rules: must be a JSON array of file paths
entries.description: UI pictures for this Solution's part of the work

entries.rules: written only by generation, never by the form
entries.description: AI-generated: endpoints, payloads and status codes

entries.rules: written only by generation, never by the form
entries.description: AI-generated: pages, their fields, and which endpoints they call

entries.rules: written only by generation, never by the form
entries.description: AI-generated: the paths the work is expected to touch
When the Solution was attached to this work item

relationships.guidance: How this model connects to others.

lookupsAndPerformance.question: Which fields do we search or filter on a lot?

retention.question: How long do we keep this data / when is it deleted?
retention.answer: Until the Solution is detached from the work item, or the work item is deleted.

sensitiveFields.question: Any sensitive fields that need extra protection?

invariants.question: Anything that must always be true?
invariants.answer: One row per (work item, Solution): work touching two repositories needs two sets of changes, branches and tests, and one row each is the only honest shape for that. The written half (changes, tests, branch, mockups) and the generated half (the schemas) are set by separate calls and never overwrite each other in either direction — regenerating schemas must not eat what a person typed, and re-saving a typed field must not blank the schemas. A plan can only name a Solution of the work item's own Product.

changesOverTime.guidance: Each time you come back to change this model, add an entry describing what should change.

rounds.change: New: opening a work item in Develop should let the team say which Solutions it affects and what each needs, so the AI can turn that into page and API schemas a developer builds from.
